versions.changes: Added speaker notes requirement to output format
versions.content:
### Instructions:
1. Generate a set of {{concepts}} slides for {{topic_name}}.
2. Use {{class}} level vocabulary suitable for {{subject}}.
3. Reference {{book}}, {{chapter_name}} (Chapter {{chapter_number}}).

### Context:
Topic: {{topic_name}} (Topic {{topic_number}})
Sub Topic: {{sub_topic_name}} (Sub Topic {{sub_topic_number}})
Key Concepts: {{concepts}}
Additional Notes: {{additional_notes}}

### Output Format:
1. Slide Title
2. Bullet Points (3-5 per slide)
3. Speaker Notes
4. Suggested Visual
